---
title: "Second Meeting Record"
---

## Meeting Description

Date / Time: 27 March 2026 (2.30pm - 3pm)

Location: Zoom Meeting

Attendees: Xi Zixun, Wang Zhuoran, Jin Qinhao

## Purpose

This meeting purpose is to discuss with Prof KAM Tin Seong regard the first version of proposal's feedback and Question

## Meeting Notes

1. Suggested on Improvement of data sets from a Single Country -> Multiple Country for Time Series Data Analysis
2. Questioned about EDA, Cluster and other models' direction
3. Reframe the final modules to:
   - Time Series Visual Analytics
   - Time Series Clustering
   - Forecasting Model

## Action Item - Owner & Deadline

1. Xi Zixun (30 March 2026 Deadline): EDA Update, proposal intro/data/research questions, shared arrivals framing, EDA ShinyApp Module.
2. Wang Zhuoran (30 March 2026 Deadline): Clustering Prototype, Clustering ShinyApp module, storyboard, app shell integration.
3. Jin Qinhao (30 March 2026 Deadline): Dataset update, Forecasting Prototype, Forecasting ShinyApp module, user guide, package audit, smoke test updates.
4. Shared integration work: navigation cleanup, deployment path, meeting records, and final QA.

## Expected Deliverables

1. Updated Quarto Website for Proposal, Prototype, User Guide.
2. Shiny App Module Compilation of Time Series Visual Analytics(EDA), Time Series Clustering, Forecasting Model.
3. An Updated Version of Share Processed Dataset .
